title: Oreogrammitis trichopoda
taxonomy: Oreogrammitis trichopoda is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia, specifically in countries such as Indonesia and Malaysia. The classification of Oreogrammitis trichopoda is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, division - Pteridophyta, class - Polypodiopsida, order - Polypodiales, family - Polypodiaceae, genus - Oreogrammitis, and species - O. trichopoda. The genus Oreogrammitis is further classified within the family Polypodiaceae. The classification may vary slightly depending on the source, but the above classification is a commonly accepted one.
uses: Oreogrammitis trichopoda has been used in traditional medicine, primarily in the Pacific Islands.
